name: developer_necropolis_mitigation_housing_project
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Urban Planning, the situation tagged internally around developer necropolis mitigation housing project has converged with local pressure in the Harborline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Alex Nguyen
agents.identity: I am Alex Nguyen, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Urban Planning. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Leon Ellis
agents.identity: I am Leon Ellis, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Urban Planning. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of loyalty.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of truth even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Alex Nguyen must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Alex Nguyen do?
